title: Country column restrictions
excerpt: I wanted to raise a concern regarding the  country column setup on Monday.com. At the moment, it’s not possible to build automations based on the country field, which is proving to be quite limiting for my workflow and b…

posts.author: BradleyG (Bradley Green)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to raise a concern regarding the country column setup on Monday.com. At the moment, it’s not possible to build automations based on the country field, which is proving to be quite limiting for my workflow and boards etc.

This restriction is affecting my ability to streamline tasks and automate country-specific actions or assignments, which would significantly improve efficiency—especially when dealing with multi-country processes like payroll continuity planning.
